prompt: You are given a single image of a folded paper strip. Several visible segments on the strip are labeled with letters. The strip has a START marker (green ring) and an END marker (red ring). Determine the true order of the labeled segments encountered when walking along the strip from START to END. Return the labels as a single string with no separators (e.g. ABCDE). Exact match required.
